backstory.original: Yorven Springpaw disappeared from the Feywild as a child after an encounter with a malicious coven of hags. He ended up lost in the Shadowfell, where he embraced his innate primal spirit to survive. The power of this ancient feral beast helped Yorven do more than survive the dangers of the Shadowfell -- he thrived. When Yorven came across the Witchlight Carnival he managed to convince the owners to bring him on board. When the Witchlight Carnival returned to the Feywild years later, Yorven moved on, seeking his childhood home - and the hags who banished him.
backstory.display: 约尔文·春爪在儿时遇到一个邪恶的鬼婆女巫会后便失踪了。随后他出现在堕影冥界，在那里迷失了方向，但依靠自己与生俱来的原始精灵生存了下来。这只上古野兽的力量对约尔文的帮助远不只是在暗影位面存活--他变得越来越强大。约尔文遇到女巫之光嘉年华的时候，他说服两位老板也让他加入其中。多年以后女巫之光嘉年华重返妖精荒野，约尔文决定去寻找儿时的家园--还有那些放逐了他的鬼婆。

description.original: Yorven leaps out at the nearest enemy, pinning it in place and attacking it once a second for 5 seconds
description.display: 约尔文跃向最近的敌人，将其定身并每秒攻击一次，持续 5 秒。

longDescription.original: Yorven leaps at the nearest enemy, rooting it in place and attacking it once every second for 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 约尔文跃向最近的敌人，将其定身并每秒攻击一次，持续 5 秒。

description.original: Yorven Springpaw wild shapes into a powerful shadow mastiff-like creature for 30 seconds.
description.display: 约尔文·春爪将变形成强大的暗影獒状生物，持续 30 秒。

longDescription.original: Yorven Springpaw wild shapes into a shadow mastiff-like creature for 30 seconds. During this time their attack cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds, and their damage is increased by 400%.
longDescription.display: 约尔文·春爪将变形成暗影獒状生物，持续 30 秒。在此期间，他的基本攻击冷却时间减少 2.5 秒，并且造成的伤害提升 400%。

description.desc: Yorven can be used in any Wild Beyond the Witchlight campaign adventure or variant, even if he would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
约尔文可用于任何女巫之光的荒野之旅战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
Yorven increases the damage of all Champions in the formation by $amount% for each unique species in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一个独特的种族，约尔文使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Yorven increases the damage of all Champions for each unique species in the formation.
tipText.display: 阵型中每有一个独特的种族，约尔文会提高所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Yorven gains a Blood Fury stack for each enemy that has been damaged in the current area. His damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Blood Fury stack, stacking multiplicatively. Bosses provide 15 stacks when they are damaged. Caps at $max_stacks stacks.
当前区域内，每有一名已受到伤害的敌人，约尔文就会获得一层“血怒”。每有一层“血怒”，他的伤害提升$(not_buffed amount___2)，以乘算方式堆叠。首领受到伤害时，会提供 15 层“血怒”，堆叠上限为 $max_stacks 层。
All Champions take $amount less damage from all attacks, and Rag Tag Team is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% each time Yorven's max health is doubled, stacking multiplicatively.
所有勇士受到的所有攻击伤害减少 $amount，并且每次约尔文的最大生命值加倍时，“乌合双人组”的伤害会提升$(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Champions in the formation with Yorven take less damage from attacks, and his main buff is increased when his maximum health increases.
tipText.display: 阵型中有约尔文时，勇士受到的攻击伤害减少，且约尔文最大生命值提高时，主要增益也提升。

description.desc: Yorven's damage is increased by $amount% and if an enemy dies while he is attacking it with Ferocious Maul, he immediately leaps to another enemy and begins attacking that one. This adds one additional attack to Ferocious Maul each time it triggers.
约尔文的伤害提升 $amount%，并且如果他正用“疯狂爪击”攻击的敌人死亡时，他会立即跳到另一个敌人身上并开始攻击该敌人。此技能每次触发时将为“疯狂爪击”额外增加一次攻击。

specializationDescription.original: Yorven turns his remaining ferocity on additional enemies
specializationDescription.display: 约尔文将他剩余的凶残转向其他敌人

description.desc: Each time Yorven Springpaw attacks during Ferocious Maul, an inky tendril of Eldritch energy shoots out and zaps a different random enemy, dealing $amount second of BUD-based damage. The amount is increased by 400% if Yorven is the BUD-setting Champion. If no other enemies are on screen, this ability does nothing.
每当约尔文·春爪在疯狂爪击期间发动攻击，将向一名随机敌人射出一根附带魔能的黑色触须，并随机电击另一名敌人，造成持续 $amount 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。如果约尔文为基础杀招伤害设置的勇士，该数值提升 400%。如果屏幕上没有其他敌人，该技能不会生效。

specializationDescription.original: Yorven's tattoo helps him deal additional damage
specializationDescription.display: 约尔文的纹身帮助他造成额外伤害

description.desc: Yorven's Rag Tag Team is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Blood Fury stack Yorven has.
约尔文每有一层“血怒”，乌合双人组伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Yorven's Blood Fury inspires his allies to deal more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 约尔文的“血怒”能激励他的队友造成更多伤害。

description.desc: Yorven gains the Debuff role and any enemy he has attacked takes $(not_buffed amount)% additional damage from all Champions each time it attacks a member of the formation, stacking multiplicatively up to 25 times.
约尔文获得“减益”角色定位，并且每次他攻击过的敌人攻击阵型中的成员时，都会受到所有勇士额外 $(not_buffed amount)% 的伤害，且效果以乘算方式堆叠，最多叠加 25 次。

specializationDescription.original: Yorven's attacks enrage his foes, making them more vulnerable each time they attack the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 约尔文的攻击会激怒他的敌人，使得敌人每次攻击阵型时都会变得更加脆弱。

description.desc: Yorven increases the effect of Rag Tag Team by $(not_buffed amount)% for each adventure, variant, and Patron variant you have completed in the Wild Beyond the Witchlight campaign, stacking multiplicatively.
对于你在女巫之光的荒野之旅战役中所完成的每个冒险、支线任务和赞助者支线任务，约尔文会使“乌合双人组”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.original: I did not begin this fight, but I will finish it.
description.display: 虽然战斗并非自我开始，但我可以一直坚持到结束。

description.original: You won't break free of my claws.
description.display: 你们休想逃出我的爪子。

description.original: None shall suffer while I can defend them.
description.display: 有我守护他们的时候，谁都不会受苦。

description.original: We shall not go gently into the darkness before us.
description.display: 我们应该轻轻地走进我们眼前的黑暗。

description.original: Together, we will be fine.
description.display: 只要我们在一起，就没问题。

description.original: With friends like these, I'll never be lost again.
description.display: 有了这样的朋友，我再也不会迷失方向了。

description.original: The magic of the tattoo overflows from its lines.
description.display: 纹身的魔法比看上去的还要强大。

description.original: The tattoo evokes fury in its form and colors.
description.display: 那纹身的形状和颜色让人联想到愤怒。

description.original: Not enough. It's never enough.
description.display: 还不够。血永远都不够。

effects.description: Increases Yorven's Blood Fury Stacks max to 30

description.original: I've come back from the shadows to defend against evil.
description.display: 我从暗影中归来，准备对抗邪恶。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: The darkness of the Shadowfell imbues me now.
description.display: 堕影冥界的黑暗开始入侵我的头脑了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: Despite everything, I'm still me.
description.display: 尽管发生了这么多事，我还是我。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: You have to be quicker than danger to survive.
description.display: 你必须比危险更快，才能活下去。

effects.description: Increases the damage reduction of Yorven's Danger Sense ability by $amount%

description.original: I am what lurks in the shadows now.
description.display: 现在我才是潜伏在阴影中的人了。

effects.description: Increases the Rag Tag Team damage boost of Yorven's Danger Sense ability by $amount%

description.original: *lightning crash*
description.display: *闪电炸裂*

effects.description: Increases the Rag Tag Team damage boost of Yorven's Danger Sense ability by $amount%

description.original: I'm never late. I arrive exactly when I intend to.
description.display: 我从不迟到。我总是在计划的时间到达。

description.original: Once I find the hags who banished me, I'll have their heads.
description.display: 等我找到那些放逐我的鬼婆，我定要她们的脑袋。

description.original: It feeds on my anger. See now how much it has grown.
description.display: 它以我的愤怒为食。看看它现在长多大了。

effects.description: Increases the number of tendrils summoned by Yorven's Eldritch Claw Tattoo by 1

description.original: Listen to my tale, of the dark things that stir in the mortal soul...
description.display: 听听我的故事，它讲述了关于凡人的灵魂中所混入的黑暗事物......

description.original: The longer I fight, the angrier I get.
description.display: 我战斗得越久，就越愤怒。

description.original: A useful tool, but a paltry weapon. Still better than nothing.
description.display: 作为工具很好用，但作为武器毫无价值。不过总比没有好。

description.original: They keep a keen edge, no matter how many times I use them.
description.display: 无论我怎么用，它的刃口都很锋利。

description.original: A memento of a more innocent time, before I was stolen from my home.
description.display: 一个更纯真的时代的纪念品，在我被从家里偷走之前。

description.original: The Feywild is a tricky place, but it pays to remember who your friends are.
description.display: 妖精荒野是个怪异的地方，但它能让你记住谁是你的朋友。

description.original: Of course, it hurt when I got them. But the pain is a trifle.
description.display: 当然，打孔的时候痛死了。但痛苦是无关紧要的。

description.original: Decoration may be frivolous, but it reminds me I am still myself.
description.display: 作为装饰可能很肤浅，但它能提醒我，我还是我自己。

description.original: These blaze like the moonlight over Prismeer.
description.display: 它亮得就像普利斯米尔的月光。

description.original: There is a warmth to this gold that I never knew in the Shadowfell.
description.display: 这些黄金上有我在堕影冥界从未感受到过的温暖。

description.original: I used the tools at hand to survive in the Shadowfell.
description.display: 我用趁手的工具在堕影冥界生存。

description.original: This tattoo is rage made into ink.
description.display: 这个刺青由怒火化成的。

description.original: With this, my enemies' magic cannot stop me.
description.display: 有了它，敌人的魔法就没法阻止我。

description.original: I will take this magic into my skin, and rise up a stronger champion.
description.display: 我要把这个魔法刻在我的皮肤上，召唤出一个更强壮的勇士。

description.original: Abandoned in the Shadowfell, I had only the clothes on my back and a few trinkets.
description.display: 被遗弃在堕影冥界的时候，我身上只有背上这么一块破布和几个吊坠。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: With my legs free, I leap easily from the shadows.
description.display: 我的腿获得自由之后，我轻松地从暗影中跳了出来。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I can move faster in this.
description.display: 穿着这个我的动作可以更快。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: It's safe to wear in colors now. As powerful as I've become I don't need to hide.
description.display: 现在穿有颜色的衣服已经安全了。像我这么强大的人，完全没必要藏起来。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I took this from a shadow dragon. It won't miss it.
description.display: 这是我从一头暗影龙那里得来的。反正它不会再想念它的。

description.original: Shadow dragons may be weaker than true dragons, but they are swift and wily.
description.display: 暗影龙虽然比真正的巨龙弱，但仍然迅捷而狡猾。

description.original: The scales of a shadow dragon are as hard as the Raven Queen's heart.
description.display: 暗影龙的鳞和渡鸦女王的心一样硬。

description.original: If you can dodge the dragons' breath of shadows, their claws might still take you.
description.display: 如果你能躲开龙的暗影吐息，他们的爪子仍然能拍到你。

description.original: This is what I was wearing when I was taken to the Shadowfell.
description.display: 这就是我被带到堕影冥界时身上穿着的衣服。

description.original: I had to make do, even as I grew up among the Shadowfell's dark dangers.
description.display: 即使我成长于堕影冥界的黑暗危险中，我仍不得不将就使用它。

description.original: I pieced this together to stay warm as I grew
description.display: 长大以后我缝好了这件衣服用来保暖

description.original: With trophies from my battles, I remade my old vest, much as I remade myself.
description.display: 用得来的战利品，我重新补好了旧背心，也让自己得到了重生。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Yorven Springpaw disappeared from the Feywild as a child after an encounter with a malicious coven of hags. He ended up lost in the Shadowfell, where he embraced his innate primal spirit to survive. The power of this ancient feral beast helped Yorven do more than survive the dangers of the Shadowfell -- he thrived. When Yorven came across the Witchlight Carnival he managed to convince the owners to bring him on board. When the Witchlight Carnival returned to the Feywild years later, Yorven moved on, seeking his childhood home - and the hags who banished him.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Yorven is a DPS/Support Champion who pins enemies down with mutliple attacks, marking them for extra damage

character_sheet_details.backstory: 约尔文·春爪在儿时遇到一个邪恶的鬼婆女巫会后便失踪了。随后他出现在堕影冥界，在那里迷失了方向，但依靠自己与生俱来的原始精灵生存了下来。这只上古野兽的力量对约尔文的帮助远不只是在暗影位面存活--他变得越来越强大。约尔文遇到女巫之光嘉年华的时候，他说服两位老板也让他加入其中。多年以后女巫之光嘉年华重返妖精荒野，约尔文决定去寻找儿时的家园--还有那些放逐了他的鬼婆。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 约尔文是一位伤害输出/支援勇士，他会用多重攻击压制敌人，同时标记他们以提高伤害

effects.description: Increases Yorven's Blood Fury Stacks max to 30

display.name: 嗜血者
display.description: 还不够。血永远都不够。

effects.description: 使约尔文“血怒”的堆叠层数上限提高到 30

original.name: Shadowtouched
original.description: Despite everything, I'm still me.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 堕影之触
display.description: 尽管发生了这么多事，我还是我。

effects.description: 使约尔文的所有专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Keeping Time
original.description: I'm never late. I arrive exactly when I intend to.

display.name: 守时
display.description: 我从不迟到。我总是在计划的时间到达。

original.name: Hardened Heart
original.description: Once I find the hags who banished me, I'll have their heads.

display.name: 铁石心肠
display.description: 等我找到那些放逐我的鬼婆，我定要她们的脑袋。

original.name: Eldritch Mutation
original.description: It feeds on my anger. See now how much it has grown.

effects.description: Increases the number of tendrils summoned by Yorven's Eldritch Claw Tattoo by 1

display.name: 魔能变异
display.description: 它以我的愤怒为食。看看它现在长多大了。

effects.description: 使约尔文的“魔能之爪刺青”召唤的卷须数量增加 1

original.name: Too Late
original.description: The longer I fight, the angrier I get.

display.name: 太迟了
display.description: 我战斗得越久，就越愤怒。

original.name: Iron Scissors
original.description: A useful tool, but a paltry weapon. Still better than nothing.

display.name: 铁剪刀
display.description: 作为工具很好用，但作为武器毫无价值。不过总比没有好。

original.name: Protective Shears
original.description: They keep a keen edge, no matter how many times I use them.

display.name: 防护大剪刀
display.description: 无论我怎么用，它的刃口都很锋利。

original.name: Childlike Picture
original.description: A memento of a more innocent time, before I was stolen from my home.

display.name: 纯真照片
display.description: 一个更纯真的时代的纪念品，在我被从家里偷走之前。

original.name: Dragon Card
original.description: The Feywild is a tricky place, but it pays to remember who your friends are.

display.name: 龙牌
display.description: 妖精荒野是个怪异的地方，但它能让你记住谁是你的朋友。

original.name: First Piercings
original.description: Of course, it hurt when I got them. But the pain is a trifle.

display.name: 第一个穿孔
display.description: 当然，打孔的时候痛死了。但痛苦是无关紧要的。

original.name: Wooden Hoops
original.description: Decoration may be frivolous, but it reminds me I am still myself.

display.name: 木环
display.description: 作为装饰可能很肤浅，但它能提醒我，我还是我自己。

original.name: Silver Earrings
original.description: These blaze like the moonlight over Prismeer.

display.name: 银耳环
display.description: 它亮得就像普利斯米尔的月光。

original.name: Golden Jewelry
original.description: There is a warmth to this gold that I never knew in the Shadowfell.

display.name: 黄金首饰
display.description: 这些黄金上有我在堕影冥界从未感受到过的温暖。

original.name: Markings of Power
original.description: I used the tools at hand to survive in the Shadowfell.

display.name: 力量印记
display.description: 我用趁手的工具在堕影冥界生存。

original.name: Blood Fury Tattoo
original.description: This tattoo is rage made into ink.

display.name: 血怒刺青
display.description: 这个刺青由怒火化成的。

original.name: Eldritch Claw Tattoo
original.description: With this, my enemies' magic cannot stop me.

display.name: 魔能之爪刺青
display.description: 有了它，敌人的魔法就没法阻止我。

original.name: The Beast Within
original.description: I will take this magic into my skin, and rise up a stronger champion.

display.name: 内心的野兽
display.description: 我要把这个魔法刻在我的皮肤上，召唤出一个更强壮的勇士。

original.name: Ragged Wrappings
original.description: Abandoned in the Shadowfell, I had only the clothes on my back and a few trinkets.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 破旧裹布
display.description: 被遗弃在堕影冥界的时候，我身上只有背上这么一块破布和几个吊坠。

effects.description: 使约尔文的所有专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Shadowy Garb
original.description: With my legs free, I leap easily from the shadows.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 暗影装束
display.description: 我的腿获得自由之后，我轻松地从暗影中跳了出来。

effects.description: 使约尔文的所有专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Kilt of Speed
original.description: I can move faster in this.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 速度褶裙
display.description: 穿着这个我的动作可以更快。

effects.description: 使约尔文的所有专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Warrior's Kilt
original.description: It's safe to wear in colors now. As powerful as I've become I don't need to hide.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Yorven's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 战士褶裙
display.description: 现在穿有颜色的衣服已经安全了。像我这么强大的人，完全没必要藏起来。

effects.description: 使约尔文的所有专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Lost Tooth
original.description: I took this from a shadow dragon. It won't miss it.

display.name: 丢失的牙齿
display.description: 这是我从一头暗影龙那里得来的。反正它不会再想念它的。

original.name: Tooth Trophy
original.description: Shadow dragons may be weaker than true dragons, but they are swift and wily.

display.name: 牙齿战利品
display.description: 暗影龙虽然比真正的巨龙弱，但仍然迅捷而狡猾。

original.name: Scaled Sporran
original.description: The scales of a shadow dragon are as hard as the Raven Queen's heart.

display.name: 鳞袋
display.description: 暗影龙的鳞和渡鸦女王的心一样硬。

original.name: Claw-Forged Vessel
original.description: If you can dodge the dragons' breath of shadows, their claws might still take you.

display.name: 爪铸容器
display.description: 如果你能躲开龙的暗影吐息，他们的爪子仍然能拍到你。

original.name: Child's Vest
original.description: This is what I was wearing when I was taken to the Shadowfell.

display.name: 孩童背心
display.description: 这就是我被带到堕影冥界时身上穿着的衣服。

original.name: Child's Vest
original.description: I had to make do, even as I grew up among the Shadowfell's dark dangers.

display.name: 孩童背心
display.description: 即使我成长于堕影冥界的黑暗危险中，我仍不得不将就使用它。

original.name: Repaired Jerkin
original.description: I pieced this together to stay warm as I grew

display.name: 修好的短上衣
display.description: 长大以后我缝好了这件衣服用来保暖

original.name: Repaired Jerkin
original.description: With trophies from my battles, I remade my old vest, much as I remade myself.

display.name: 修好的短上衣
display.description: 用得来的战利品，我重新补好了旧背心，也让自己得到了重生。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位力量大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有混乱阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
